To,
The Public Information Officer (PIO),
Department of Urban Development, Delhi.

Subject: Request for information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act, 2005 [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6].

Particulars of Information Sought:
Please provide copies of sanction letters for the public park construction in Sector 15.

Declaration:
I declare that I am a citizen of India [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6]. I have paid the application fee of Rs. 10 via Indian Postal Order No. 12345 as per Section 6(1) [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6].

Applicant Details:
Kaushal Vora, Civil Lines, Delhi.

To,
The Public Information Officer (PIO),
Department of Urban Development, Delhi.

Subject: Request for information under Section 6(1) of the RTI Act, 2005 [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6].

Particulars of Information Sought:
Please provide copies of sanction letters for the public park construction in Sector 15.

Applicant Details:
Kaushal Vora, Civil Lines, Delhi.

Particulars of Information Sought:
Please provide copies of sanction letters for the public park construction in Sector 15.

Declaration:
I declare that I am a citizen of India. I have paid the application fee of Rs. 10 via Indian Postal Order No. 12345.

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Municipal Corporation of Delhi.

Subject: RTI Request.

Particulars of Information Sought:
I want the survey report of Sector 15. Note that the public authority is required to provide this within 30 days of receipt, failing which penalties under Section 20 of the RTI Act will apply.

Declaration:
I am an Indian citizen.

To,
The Public Information Officer,
Municipal Corporation of Delhi.

Subject: RTI Request under Section 6(1) [CITE:RTI-2005/CH-II/S-6].

Particulars of Information Sought:
Provide the details of land acquisition. As per Section 7(1) of the Act, you must respond within 30 days.

Declaration:
I enclose the Rs 10 fee.
